title: AI_OS Packet Runtime State
description: Foundation schema stub for volatile packet state. Runtime state changes over time and should not replace the durable packet contract.

schema.description: Identifies this object as AI_OS packet runtime state.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this runtime state schema contract.

assigned_worker_id.description: Worker currently assigned to the packet, if any.

generated_at.description: Timestamp when this runtime view was generated.
